templates.name: Stand-Up Pouch 4×6
templates.description: Standard stand-up pouch for snacks, coffee, supplements. Popular for single-serve packaging.

templates.name: Stand-Up Pouch 5×8
templates.description: Larger stand-up pouch for family-size snacks, pet food, bulk supplements.

templates.name: Flat Pouch 3×5
templates.description: Slim flat pouch for samples, condiments, travel-size products. Heat-sealed three sides.

templates.name: Flat Pouch 4×7
templates.description: Medium flat pouch for protein powder packets, medical devices, hardware kits.
